items.title: The Q3 Earnings Season Gets Underway: A Closer Look
items.description: The Q3 earnings season picks up notable pace with the release of the big banks' results next week, but we've already heard from several S&P 500 members that we count in our Q3 tally. How are things looking so far?

items.title: Party Like it's 1999? Why the Nasdaq will Double from Here
items.description: The 2025 bull market is unusually bullish. Although stocks experienced a tremendous run since the 'Liberation Day' lows, several key data points suggest that the Nasdaq could still double from here.
